scripts.build:brands: npm run build:brands:discover && npm run build:brands:beatbox && npm run build:brands:freelabel && npm run build:brands:heyiris && npm run build:brands:emc_radio && npm run build:brands:capital_collective
scripts.build:brands:discover: npx remotion render BrandIntro out/intros/discover-intro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"discover"}' && npx remotion render BrandOutro out/outros/discover-outro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"discover"}'
scripts.build:brands:beatbox: npx remotion render BrandIntro out/intros/beatbox-intro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"beatbox"}' && npx remotion render BrandOutro out/outros/beatbox-outro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"beatbox"}'
scripts.build:brands:freelabel: npx remotion render BrandIntro out/intros/freelabel-intro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"freelabel"}' && npx remotion render BrandOutro out/outros/freelabel-outro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"freelabel"}'
scripts.build:brands:heyiris: npx remotion render BrandIntro out/intros/heyiris-intro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"heyiris"}' && npx remotion render BrandOutro out/outros/heyiris-outro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"heyiris"}'
scripts.build:brands:emc_radio: npx remotion render BrandIntro out/intros/emc_radio-intro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"emc_radio"}' && npx remotion render BrandOutro out/outros/emc_radio-outro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"emc_radio"}'
scripts.build:brands:capital_collective: npx remotion render BrandIntro out/intros/capital_collective-intro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"capital_collective"}' && npx remotion render BrandOutro out/outros/capital_collective-outro.mp4 --props '{"brand":"capital_collective"}'
